data.name: Jail College
data.detailed_description:
JAIL COLLEGE is an adult visual novel combining steamy storytelling, engaging trivia, and player-driven choices.
You play as an honest man sent to prison after stealing food to save his starving family. When offered a chance to join an experimental university program inside the prison walls, he must study, answer trivia questions, and earn his degree… while charming a cast of beautiful and seductive hot woman.

Your knowledge is your key to freedom — and to unlocking erotic rewards.

🎓 Key Features

  • 🔥 Adult visual novel

  • 🧠 Trivia gameplay — answer general knowledge quizzes to progress and unlock steamy scenes

  • 💋 Seductive cast — professors, social workers, and prison staff, each with unique personalities and stories

  • 🎨 Anime-inspired art — colorful anime style artworks to deliver a vibrant, comic-like anime atmosphere

  • 💡 Made in Ren'Py

Are you ready to study hard, play smart, and charm your way to freedom?

Few info about the characters:

📚 Alma Hayduk
A former bestselling romance author turned Spanish Literature professor. Alma teaches with passion, elegance, and a sensual charm that makes every lesson feel like forbidden poetry.

👑 Director Anjeleena Steel
The ruthless Ice Queen. A prison warden with iron discipline and a dark secret desire—only the right man can shatter her cold control.

📖 Charlene Furiosa
An authority on ancient history… and ancient lusts. Behind her marble mask lies a dominatrix of the mind, eager to test the limits of knowledge and desire.

🏃‍♀️ Haley Blazy
Ex-Olympian, now coach of body and willpower. Her lessons are sweat, discipline, and temptation—every challenge a dangerous game of endurance and desire.

✨ Heather Adams
The heart of the prison project. Warm, intelligent, and endlessly empathetic—yet her guidance hides a subtle, irresistible game of temptation.

🎨 Isabella Bellezza
A philosopher of beauty and desire. Enigmatic, magnetic, almost sacred—her gaze alone is a lesson in art, eros, and eternal mystery.

💃 Jennifer Ramirez
The fiery Latin MILF. Professor of Music and Dance, she teaches with rhythm, laughter, and unapologetic sensuality—every step a seduction.

📚 Juleea Rubin
The Gothic muse. Refined, theatrical, and secretly burning for forbidden passion—every lesson feels like a dark, romantic play.

⚗️ July-Ann Flame
The alchemist of pleasure. A sensual scientist who blends chemistry and desire, turning every “experiment” into a dangerous, intoxicating game.

🎬 Michella Vaughn
The temptress mentor. Elegant, decadent, and sharp-tongued—she teaches cinema and literature with a glass of wine in hand and seduction in her smile.

data.short_description: JAIL COLLEGE is an adult visual novel that blends erotic storytelling, trivia challenges, and interactive choices. Play as a wrongly imprisoned man offered a chance at freedom through a sensual multicultural program. Pass quizzes, seduce hot woman, and get your freedom back!

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
